reviews.review_description: Pls add me on meta I really want to talk to you about the game because I like the idea of this game and wanna try to help out. I’m not good at coding, but I do know people who are good at coding and making VR games also I can help you advertise. I just really wanna be a part of this game and not just apart of the community of the game. Because I think this game could be great.
it is in its early form but i see potential
